prompt.content:
Please update the model using the data as follows:

1. Use the 10-Year Treasury rate as the risk-free rate as at 2026-01-02.
2. Use the GDP growth rate from 2025-04-01 to 2025-07-01 as the long-term growth rate.

Please return the updated Pre-Spin off Enterprise Value of S&P Global and the Post Spin Off Enterprise Values of RemainCo and S&P Mobility. All monetary results must be displayed in USD millions, rounded to two decimal places.
